block_00: With social login and adaptive language!
block_01: Time to refresh your registration frames!
block_03: We are happy to introduce new registration frames for our affiliates! The new frames compare favorably with the old ones due to several features:
block_04: Social login. Now, users can register with their existing login information from a social network provider like Facebook or Google.
block_05: Adaptive language. The frame will automatically switch to the user's browser language.
block_06: "Already have an account? Log in" button for registered users, so that they do not use the registration frame as a login form.
block_07: 2 frames with social buttons (light and dark), as well as a more compact frame without social buttons.
block_09: How will you benefit from new registration frames?
block_10: If you use your own landing pages, our frames will simplify registration and increase the chances of conversion. Just keep in mind that custom landings must
block_12: If you use mobile apps and for some reason don't want to send the user away for the app download, the new frames will allow in-browser trading without redirecting to the app store. The user will get straight to the Traderoom, which might boost conversion to trading.
block_13: Be aware that the old frames will only remain functional for the next 3 months. Make sure to update them before long!
block_14: Waste no time, change your registration frames today 👇
